title: The Human Information Retrieval Search Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative and multi-stage process of how people search for information, from recognizing a need to evaluating results.
relationships: A user progresses sequentially from recognizing an Information Need to becoming a Satisfied User, but the process is iterative; based on Information Evaluation, the user may loop back to reformulate their Query or interact with the Search System differently before their need is met.
